zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger le Poitevin於1054年出生在法國豪-諾門迪時，他的父親Roger de Montgomery32歲，母親Mabel Talvas29歲。他於大約1083年與Almodis de la Marche在法國波特芝士結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1123年在法國利姆辛豪-維安哈盧享年69歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪艾法圖維爾-格雷斯當。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger le Poitevin于1054年出生在法国豪-諾門迪时，他的父亲Roger de Montgomery32岁，母亲Mabel Talvas29岁。他于大约1083年与Almodis de la Marche在法国波特芝士结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1123年在法国利姆辛豪-維安哈盧享年69岁，埋葬在法国豪-諾門迪艾法圖維爾-格雷斯當。

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Poitevin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French Poitevin: habitational name for someone from Poitou, a former province in western France whose capital city was Poitiers. See also Poitevent , compare Potvin 1.

variants.name: Potvin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Armand, Gilles, Alphonse, Andre, Cecile, Michel, Pierre, Adelard, Adrien, Aime, Benoit.
French Canadian: altered form of French Poitevin (see Poitevint ). Compare Podvin 1 and Potwin .
In some cases possibly also French: variant (shortened form) of French Poitevin (see Poitevint , compare 1 above).

variants.name: Poitevent
meanings: History: This surname is listed along with its original form Poitevin in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors. The Huguenot ancestor was Antoine Poitevin from France, who immigrated with his family to Charleston, SC, in 1685. His descendants also bear the surname Poitevint.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger le Poitevin was born in 1054, in Upper Normandy, France, his father, Roger de Montgomery, was 32 and his mother, Mabel Talvas, was 29. He married Almodis de la Marche about 1083, in Poitou, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1123, in Charroux, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, France, at the age of 69, and was buried in Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger le Poitevin est né en 1054, à Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Roger de Montgomery, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mabel Talvas, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Almodis de la Marche environ 1083, à Poitou, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1123, à Charroux, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, France, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger le Poitevin 1054 in Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Montgomery 32 und seine Mutter Mabel Talvas 29. Er hat um 1083 in Poitou, Frankreich Almodis de la Marche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1123 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Charroux, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Frankreich und wurde in Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger le Poitevin è nato il nel 1054 nel Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Roger de Montgomery, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Mabel Talvas, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Almodis de la Marche circa 1083, nel Poitou, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1123, nel Charroux, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Francia, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger le Poitevinが1054年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディで生まれた時，父Roger de Montgomeryは32歳，母Mabel Talvasは29歳であった。約1083年にフランスポイトウでAlmodis de la Marcheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1123年にフランスリモウシンハウテ-ヴィエンチャーロウックスで69歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアファトウヴィレ-グレスティインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger le Poitevin(이)가 1054년 프랑스 하테-노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Montgomery(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel Talvas(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1083년 프랑스 포이토우에서 Almodis de la Marche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1123년 프랑스 리모우신 하테-비니 처루스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 팻우비레-그레스테인에 묻혔다.

mn.Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England: Shrewsbury, Salopesberia, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger le Poitevin nasceu em 1054, em Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Roger de Montgomery, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mabel Talvas, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Almodis de la Marche aproximadamente 1083, em Poitou, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1123, em Charroux, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, França, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger le Poitevin родился в 1054 г. в местности хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Roger de Montgomery было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mabel Talvas, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Almodis de la Marche около 1083 г. в местности поитоу, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1123 г. в местности чарроукс, хауте-виенн, лимусин, Франция в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности фатоувилле-грестеин, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger le Poitevin nació en 1054, en Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Roger de Montgomery, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mabel Talvas, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Almodis de la Marche aproximadamente 1083, en Poitou, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1123, en Charroux, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Francia, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
